overview: This dragonfly appears to be a Four-spotted Pennant (Brachymesia gravida), a species of skimmer known for its distinctive dark wing tips. The insect is actively engaged in oviposition, dipping its abdomen into the water to release eggs. This behavior is often performed by females while hovering over the shallow edges of ponds or streams. Dragonflies are fast fliers that use specialized wing movements to hover and maneuver precisely while depositing eggs. Wikipedia +4 5 sites Brachymesia gravida - Wikipedia

This dragonfly appears to be a Four-spotted Pennant (Brachymesia gravida), a species of skimmer known for its distinctive dark wing tips.
The insect is actively engaged in oviposition, dipping its abdomen into the water to release eggs.
This behavior is often performed by females while hovering over the shallow edges of ponds or streams.
Dragonflies are fast fliers that use specialized wing movements to hover and maneuver precisely while depositing eggs.
